title: Test Suite Results After Consolidation
details:
Test Suite Results After Consolidation Cleanup:

OVERALL STATUS:
✅ Test consolidation successful - no tests lost
📊 Total Tests: 812 (Same count as before cleanup)
✅ Passed: 806 tests
❌ Failed: 3 tests (all in ConfigManagerTests)
⏭️ Skipped: 3 tests
⏱️ Duration: 10.0 seconds

FAILING TESTS (Pre-existing, not related to consolidation):
1. LoadConfigurationAsync_WithInvalidJson_ReturnsFailureResult
   - Location: ConfigManagerTests.cs:386
   - Error: Assert.IsNotNull failed

2. LoadConfigurationAsync_WithFileReadFailure_ReturnsFailureResult  
   - Location: ConfigManagerTests.cs:416
   - Error: Assert.IsNotNull failed

3. LoadConfigurationAsync_ComplexConfiguration_ParsesCorrectly
   - Location: ConfigManagerTests.cs:665
   - Error: Assert.AreEqual failed. Expected:<tenant-id>. Actual:<(null)>

All failures are in configuration-related tests and appear to be pre-existing issues, not caused by the test project consolidation.
